DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GEE, LESTER DBA  SF AUTO CARE
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LESTER GEE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-09-2010 AT 3:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BILLS, MIKE J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ISIDRO, CUELLAR $1,711.50 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,801.50, DEFENDANT LESTER GEE, DBA S.F. AUTOMOTIVE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
